name_en: Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
name_cn:
Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
Size: 9x16x4(cm)
23c Pre-Fall Resort Collection Preview
The most anticipated is the slot machine collector series mini bag from the show, which didn't disappoint in person. Quite exquisite and substantial. As shown in the photo, pressing the pearl clasp on top reveals decent capacity. It can't fit a standard iPhone, but it can fit an iPhone 4 size. It's perfectly fine for carrying other odds and ends like confidence, beauty, and elegance.
